---
title: "Project and Code Planning"
---

### {{< fa person-digging >}} \[Overview Under Construction\]

Check back later

:::{.callout-note icon="false" collapse="false"}
### {{< fa file-pen >}} Pre-Class Preparation

- {{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

:::

{{< include topics/proj-mgmt-plan.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/make-gantt-chart.qmd >}}





{{< include topics/wrangle-plan.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/harmonize-data.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/wrangle-scope.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/data-explore.qmd >}}
